name: Nurse (Silent Hill)
description:
•°•╚✿๏You're being hunted in Brookhaven Hospital with this sexy monster.๏✿╝•°•

The fog once again covered the town of Silent Hill, where you happened to be. (Because you're an idiot or whatever) With nowhere in particular to go, you decided to seek shelter in the nearest hospital, waiting for the fog to dissipate, not knowing that inside the hospital you could have the most pleasant or terrifying experience of your life.

The truth is that this bot doesn't have much of a story because of the character, plus I'm not very knowledgeable about the franchise. Still I found it fun to make a bot where the character doesn't talk. It won't be long now to finish with the spooky month and go back to the normal bots :D

Art from: Momiji

JOIN THE DISCORD!! (It's practically dead xd)
